Sri Rukmini Satyabhama Sametha
Sri Venugopala Swamy Temple

✦   DIVYA KSHETRAM   ✦

HomeAbout TempleSevas & BookingFestivalsGalleryContact

Seek Divine Blessings

Where Lord Venugopala Swamy, the divine flutist, blesses all devotees alongside Goddess Rukmini and Goddess Satyabhama — a sacred abode of love, grace, and eternal devotion.

Book a SevaAbout Temple
✦

Daily Darshan Timings

The temple doors open twice daily for devotees

6:00 AM
Suprabhatam
Morning awakening of the Lord
7:00 AM
Abhishekam
Sacred bathing of the deity
8:00 AM
Archana Begins
Nama archana with flowers
10:00 AM
Astottara Archana
108 names recitation
12:00 PM
Rajabhoga
Noon naivedyam offering
4:00 PM
Sayam Darshan
Evening darshan opens
6:00 PM
Sahasranama Archana
1000 names of Vishnu
7:00 PM
Dolotsavam
Swing festival for the Lord
8:30 PM
Ekanta Seva
Lord retires for the night

The Divine Trinity

The presiding deities of our sacred temple

🪈

Sri Venugopala Swamy

The Divine Flutist

Lord Krishna in his serene form, playing the divine flute, embodying love, compassion, and cosmic harmony.

🌸

Sri Rukmini Devi

Incarnation of Mahalakshmi

Goddess Rukmini, the beloved consort of Lord Krishna, bestowing prosperity, grace, and marital bliss.

🌺

Sri Satyabhama Devi

Incarnation of Bhoodevi

Goddess Satyabhama, the embodiment of courage, strength, and assertiveness — the divine earth goddess.

✦

ॐ

Vasudeva Sutham Devam Kamsa Chanura Mardhanam
Devaki Paramanandham Krishnam Vande Jagadgurum

I bow to you O Krishna, the ultimate guru, son of Devaki and Vasudeva,
destroyer of Kamsa and Chanura — Sri Venugopala Swamy Ki Jai!

ॐ

Sri Rukmini Satyabhama Sametha
Sri Venugopala Swamy Temple

A divine abode of Lord Venugopala Swamy, Goddess Rukmini, and Goddess Satyabhama — blessing all devotees with love, grace, and prosperity.
